name: Hireling AI Tuning
description: Adjusts ranged-hireling follow distances, combat activity, and retreat behavior.

patches.description: Shorten moving-owner follow distance from 16 to 8
Shorten forced catch-up distance from 24 to 16
Raise ranged-hireling activity cap from 95 to 98
Port the legacy formula offset 49 after the 3.2 compiler-folded x2, changing 40 to 98
Raise ranged-hireling retreat chance from 50 to 80
Raise ranged-hireling retreat distance from 4 to 6
